g.text: Linked-device QR phishing : session hijack : Citizen Lab attribution
Pre-auth RCE : enterprise IAM : Mar 2026 Critical Patch Update : 6.2K instances
WebKit Safari + Kernel LPE : Pegasus-linked : also macOS 14.6 Sonoma
